description: Documentation gates owned by non-runtime Nodics quality tooling. Add a gate only after that module/layer is fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nRouter complete routing contract
enforcedGates.description: All nRouter module lifecycle, configuration, route metadata, router utilities, services, and contract tests must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nConfig complete startup and generation contract
enforcedGates.description: All nConfig runtime registries, configuration scripts, startup services, utilities, clean/build entrypoints, and governance tests must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nCommon complete shared platform contract
enforcedGates.description: All nCommon configuration, lifecycle, error, interceptor, processor, promise, file, security utility, access inheritance, event, status, and traceability contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nTooling complete non-runtime command contract
enforcedGates.description: All nTooling command discovery, override governance, quality, context generation, metadata, adapters, and tests must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nTest complete test execution contract
enforcedGates.description: All nTest module lifecycle, configuration, test execution, schema test generation, router, utility, library, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nDatabase runtime contract
enforcedGates.description: nDatabase schema, connection, model, MongoDB adapter, generated CRUD, router, pipeline, controller, facade, and database wrapper contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nPipeline complete pipeline contract
enforcedGates.description: All nPipeline module lifecycle, configuration, schemas, routers, executors, listeners, utilities, and tests must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nService complete service and versioned-service contract
enforcedGates.description: All nService and vService module lifecycle, configuration, tenant, auth, authorization, communication, topology, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nDefault complete baseline contract
enforcedGates.description: All nDefault module lifecycle, configuration, router, schema, pipeline, utility, and test scaffold contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nPublish complete publish contract
enforcedGates.description: All nPublish module lifecycle, configuration, router, schema, pipeline, utility, and test scaffold contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: dataProcessor complete DEAP processing contract
enforcedGates.description: All dataProcessor module lifecycle, configuration, router, schema, pipeline, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: dataPublisher complete DEAP publishing contract
enforcedGates.description: All dataPublisher module lifecycle, configuration, router, schema, pipeline, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: cart complete commerce contract
enforcedGates.description: All cart module lifecycle, configuration, schema, router, interceptor, pipeline, service, utility, data, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: order complete commerce contract
enforcedGates.description: All order module lifecycle, configuration, initializer data, schema, router, interceptor, pipeline, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: cms complete content contract
enforcedGates.description: All CMS module lifecycle, configuration, initializer data, sample data, schema, router, interceptor, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: wcms complete workflow content contract
enforcedGates.description: All WCMS module lifecycle, configuration, workflow initializer data, import headers, router, schema, interceptor, pipeline, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: cronjob complete scheduler contract
enforcedGates.description: All cronjob module lifecycle, configuration, initializer data, router, schema, pipeline, scheduler container, lifecycle trigger, node responsibility, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nems complete event management contract
enforcedGates.description: All NEMS module lifecycle, configuration, initializer data, router, schema, event splitting, event dispatch, service, utility, and test contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: all modules complete source and test documentation contract
enforcedGates.description: Every checked Nodics module file and exported method across source, configuration, data, module lifecycle, and test surfaces must remain documented for AI tools and human developers.

reportOnlyGates.name: framework core rollout baseline
reportOnlyGates.description: Non-blocking visibility for the remaining core framework documentation rollout.
